1→"""Tests for erk exec update-pr-description command. 2→ 3→These tests verify the CLI layer behavior of the update-pr-description exec command. 4→The command generates an AI-powered PR title/body and updates the PR on GitHub, 5→preserving existing header and footer metadata. 6→""" 7→ 8→from datetime import UTC, datetime 9→ 10→from click.testing import CliRunner 11→ 12→from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.update_pr_description import update_pr_description 13→from erk_shared.gateway.git.fake import FakeGit 14→from erk_shared.gateway.github.fake import FakeGitHub 15→from erk_shared.gateway.github.issues.fake import FakeGitHubIssues 16→from erk_shared.gateway.github.issues.types import IssueComment, IssueInfo 17→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.plan_header import format_plan_content_comment 18→from erk_shared.gateway.github.pr_footer import build_pr_body_footer 19→from erk_shared.gateway.github.types import PRDetails 20→from erk_shared.gateway.graphite.fake import FakeGraphite 21→from erk_shared.gateway.graphite.types import BranchMetadata 22→from erk_shared.gateway.time.fake import FakeTime 23→from erk_shared.plan_store.draft_pr import DraftPRPlanBackend 24→from erk_shared.plan_store.draft_pr_lifecycle import build_plan_stage_body 25→from tests.fakes.prompt_executor import FakePromptExecutor 26→from tests.test_utils.context_builders import build_workspace_test_context 27→from tests.test_utils.env_helpers import ErkIsolatedFsEnv, erk_isolated_fs_env 28→from tests.test_utils.plan_helpers import format_plan_header_body_for_test 29→ 30→
... [404 lines omitted] ...
